theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

verdicts.name: Super Micro
verdicts.note: AI 서버 OEM, NVDA 출하 직접 지표
verdicts.label: ACCUMULATE

narrative.summary: Super Micro: 정량 종합 67점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 39 / 중기 74 / 장기 78. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 약과열
overheat.guidance: 분할매수만. 한 번에 들어가지 말고 1/3~1/2씩 나눠서.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 9.6% → 2-ATR 손절폭 19.3%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 2개 시그널 합류 — 일봉 200MA, Value Area High. 현재가 대비 +11.7% 위치. T1 $45.12 (R:R 1.5)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $35.89 아래 손절가 $29.88 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

narrative.summary: NVIDIA: 정량 종합 65점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 51 / 중기 67 / 장기 72. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)

top_news.title: Bruin Capital’s George Pyne: FIFA Figures ‘Mind-Blowing'
top_news.summary: George Pyne, Founder and CEO of Bruin Capital, discusses the evolving landscape of sports business and investment. The dialogue highlights key aspects of organizing a major global sporting event and the financial strategies shaping the sports industry. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Argentina’s Impsa Is in Talks to Resume Turbine Work in Venezuela
top_news.summary: Argentina’s Impsa SA is in talks with the Venezuelan government to restart manufacturing and repairs on turbines for the Andean nation’s sprawling Guri dam complex, according to the company’s top executive.

top_news.title: FC Dallas Owner: Expect Dallas FIFA Games To Sell Out
top_news.summary: Dan Hunt, owner of FC Dallas and Co-Chair of the Dallas organizing committee for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, discussed the significant economic impact expected as Dallas hosts nine World Cup matches. Hunt highlighted that unlike Super Bowl visitors who stay less than three days, World Cup fans typically stay just under ten days, leading to increased spending on hotels, restaurants, gas, and retail. He spoke with Julie Fine on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Brazil Rare-Earth Ambitions Clash With Strained Mining Regulator
top_news.summary: Brazil’s aim to become a leader in rare-earths mining is running head-on into budget cuts and staffing shortages at the sector’s regulatory agency.

top_news.title: Apotex Targets Top of Range in Biggest Canada IPO Since 2021
top_news.summary: Apotex Health Corp. is guiding investors to expect its Toronto initial public offering to price at the top of the marketing range later Tuesday, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: LA Stadium Workers Avert Strike Before First World Cup Game
top_news.summary: Workers at SoFi Stadium near Los Angeles reached a tentative agreement with management, averting the threat of a strike days before hosting the US team’s first World Cup football match.

top_news.title: Lancaster-Samuel Says Clients Have a 'Fear of Getting Out'
top_news.summary: Baylor Lancaster-Samuel, Senior Vice President and Chief Investment Officer with Amerant Investments, discusses the current phase of the equity market cycle. She says many clients have a "fear of getting out" of positions too early. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Emerging Assets Stage Comeback as Dollar Weakens Ahead of CPI
top_news.summary: Emerging-market assets gained Tuesday, with Asian technology shares rebounding from steep losses earlier in the week and most currencies strengthening against the dollar ahead of a key US inflation report.

top_news.title: S&P 500 Traders Grapple With Swings Reminiscent of Tariff Tumult
top_news.summary: The S&P 500 Index swung violently on Tuesday, almost wiping out a 2.3% plunge to close modestly lower, as investors reacted to headlines on the Iran war and looked ahead to figures that may show inflation accelerating.

top_news.title: Bond Trader Positioning Signals Fed Rate Hikes Are Coming Fast
top_news.summary: Bond traders are piling into positions targeting multiple Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes in the coming months, with some looking for a move as early as the September policy meeting.
